uploadDescription: Choose the document that should receive page numbers.
dragDropOrClick: Drag and drop a PDF here, or click to upload
localOnlyNote: The PDF stays in this browser session.
settingsDescription: Pick pages, numbering style, placement, and spacing before generating a copy.
pageRangeDescription: Leave blank for every page, or enter ranges such as 1-3,5,8-10.
fontSizeDescription: Controls the printed page-number text size.
marginDescription: Distance from the selected page edge, measured in PDF points.
previewDescription: A simplified page preview that reflects the current label, font, and position.
resultDescription: Generate and download a numbered PDF copy.
emptyResultDescription: Upload a PDF, adjust the settings, then generate the result.
readingPdfDescription: Checking page count and document structure.
generatingDescription: Writing page numbers into a new local PDF copy.
unsupportedFile: Unsupported file type. Please choose a PDF file.
encryptedPdfError: Encrypted PDF detected. Remove the owner password before adding page numbers.
generateFailedError: Failed to generate the numbered PDF.
noFileError: Upload a PDF before generating a result.
rangeInvalidToken: Use page numbers and ascending ranges separated by commas.
rangeOutOfBounds: One or more pages are outside this PDF's page count.
rangeDescending: Page ranges must go from low to high.
rangeDuplicate: Remove duplicate pages from the page range.
